PREVENTIVE WELLNESS

Clinical Health Packages

Comprehensive bone scans, joint lubrication mapping, and childhood development checks pre-packaged for optimal longevity.

Pediatrics Focus

Pediatric Growth Screen

Specifically designed for children to screen growth markers, check calcium absorption, and execute bone alignment checks.

₹2,499 / session
  • Complete Calcium Index Check
  • Vitamin D Screen & Pediatric Plan
  • Deformity & Gait Analysis
Book Package
Senior Arthroplasty

Senior Joint Longevity

Complete diagnostic review for age-related joint friction, osteoporosis screening, and structural joint lubrication checks.

₹4,999 / session
  • Bone Density Scan (DEXA)
  • Rheumatoid arthritis markers check
  • Specialist orthopedic consultation
Book Package
Sports Medicine

Athlete Performance Screen

Prevention screenings focusing on ligament stability, muscle flexibility ratios, and motor balance checkups.

₹3,499 / session
  • Range-of-motion computer checks
  • Muscle imbalance ultrasound screen
  • Sports therapist assessment
Book Package
PALLAWI HOSPITAL

Exceptional orthopedic care, children's services, and critical care units in Mancherial, Telangana. Blending clinical brilliance with genuine compassion.
